spotlight_1.name: Uber Mobility Index
spotlight_1.thesis_one_liner: Uber Mobility Index tests whether source data can identify travel and mobility demand changes before transport-linked sectors reprice.
spotlight_1.teaser_hook: Alternative data experiment tracked live in public

spotlight_2.name: Faber Momentum Rotation
spotlight_2.thesis_one_liner: Faber Momentum Rotation tests whether systematic price rotation can capture persistent sector momentum better than passive market exposure.
spotlight_2.teaser_hook: Academically validated signal with live trading receipts
